mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS avgAll, COUNT(*) AS totalRatings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE opinion IS NOT NULL) AS totalFeedback, AVG(CASE WHEN surveyed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN rating END) AS curAvg, AVG(CASE WHEN surveyed_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND surveyed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN rating END) AS prevAvg FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE rating IS NOT NULL
SELECT sentiment, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE sentiment IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sentiment

SELECT YEARWEEK(surveyed_at, 3) AS wk, CONCAT('W', LPAD(WEEK(MAX(surveyed_at), 3), 2, '0')) AS lbl, ROUND(AVG(rating), 3) AS avgRating FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE rating IS NOT NULL AND surveyed_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 49 DAY) GROUP BY wk ORDER BY wk

SELECT YEARWEEK(created_at, 3) AS wk, CONCAT('W', LPAD(WEEK(MAX(created_at), 3), 2, '0')) AS lbl, SUM(action_type = 'click') AS clicks, SUM(action_type = 'view') AS views FROM sys_user_activity_log WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 49 DAY) GROUP BY wk ORDER BY wk
SELECT complaint_category AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE sentiment = 'NEGATIVE' AND complaint_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY complaint_category ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.surveyed_at, '%m.%d %H:%i') AS t, p.persona_code AS personaCode, s.rating AS rating, s.opinion AS opinion, s.sentiment AS sentiment FROM sys_ai_report_survey s JOIN sys_user_profile p ON p.user_id = s.user_id WHERE s.opinion IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.surveyed_at DESC, s.survey_id DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(surveyed_at), '%m.%d %H:%i') AS t, CONCAT('RPT-', report_id) AS reportId, MAX(CASE WHEN question_no = 1 THEN rating END) AS star, ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS avg4, MAX(opinion IS NOT NULL) AS hasOpinion FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE report_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY report_id ORDER BY MAX(surveyed_at) DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS tm, CONCAT('usr_', user_id) AS usr, action_type AS actionType, COALESCE(action_value, target_type) AS detail FROM sys_user_activity_log ORDER BY created_at DESC, activity_log_id DESC LIMIT 12
